creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
petef@FreeBSD.org schrieb:,

> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> You fixed this a bit ago:
> ----------------------------
> revision 1.53
> date: 2001/12/28 13:18:45;  author: dinoex;  state: Exp;  lines: +1 -0
> To much _MLINKS for README.html
> ----------------------------

Yes but this may arise in other ports too,
NOPRECIOUSMAKEVARS=yes can be set as deafult in bsd.port.mk.
Should speed up the make README too.

kind regards Dirk
